{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=This Snail Shell contains the cultivation of a thousand-year-old 9-Tailed Fox. The Snail that wears it will gain its powerful magic, as well as its BO.
|affct=FAME
|hard=DEF
|source=[[Rare Rent]] from [[Female Daemons]]
|color=purple
|earth=7
|water=5
|fire=5
|wind=9
|form=Zombie
|element=Water
|realm=Bharata
|orangehard=ATK
}}
